open_drawer.description: The robot reaches out and opens a cabinet drawer from scratch.

close_drawer.description: The robot pushes an open drawer shut.

place_in_closed_drawer.description: The robot opens a drawer, places an object inside, then closes it.

pick_coke_can.description: The robot grasps a Coke can from a table.

pick_object.description: The robot picks up a small object from a cluttered table.

move_near.description: The robot pushes an object to within reach of a target location.
